# Motivation - Daily quotes · Productivity

Generated: Jul 20, 2026, 10:27 PM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)

## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 30, 2026 - Jun 16, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _The real emmet_, Jun 16, 2026, 1/5: "Can’t give zero star? Freezing three days? I didn’t pay for this app to let me cheat!!!! Last chance or u cancel forever!!! UPDATE! I Cancelled but it’s still charging me annually. Gonna have to go to my bank or court!"
            2. _Sevenee 779_, May 30, 2026, 2/5: "The app has gone down hill. I used to really enjoy it. Which inspired me to write my own quotes. But nowadays it keeps freezing. I’m about to lose my daily span of 391 days because of it. Quotes don’t get saved properly. The same Bob Marley quote only shows on the History quotes section even why unsaved, so incase I missed an important quote that I liked and never get a chance to save because the screens keep flicking to the next one. And when I try to go back to it; I can’t find it again! I really don’t want to cancel guys but if I lose my 391 day span back to day 1 then I will cancel it so please sort it out asap! Thank you"
            3. _Saz-11_, Jun 15, 2026, 3/5: "Good app found it nice to sit with a morning brew but for the last few months there has been glitches in the system and now the app won’t even open. Very frustrating of you’ve paid the yearly membership and have an over 365 streak!"

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      3 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Apr 26, 2026 - Jul 12, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _13Emy1331_, Jul 2, 2026, 1/5: "It charged me before the trial even ended. Than there was no way to cancel the trial and try t get money back. No contact info anywhere. They also send quotes that swear. I do not like that."
            2. _Slicksj_, Apr 26, 2026, 1/5: "While I’m sure a lovely App for some, I decided this was not for me on the day I downloaded the trial. I immediately cancelled my subscription, but have still been charged!!"
            3. _Brickleston_, Jul 12, 2026, 4/5: "I like this app except for if you want certain themes or backgrounds you have to subscribe which is expensive."
